title: Syrian Bean Crumble
description: A comforting and flavorful dish that combines the warmth of syrian spices with the comforting texture of a crumble topping.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the cooked soya bean mixture, chopped onion, minced garlic, ground cumin, and smoked paprika. Mix well to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x9 inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, combine the bean crumble topping and flaky pastry. Mix until the topping is evenly distributed.
Spread the crumble topping evenly over the soya bean mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and the filling is hot and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
